task_completion.description: Verify the application stack is running.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing 'docker ps' or 'docker compose ps' with the application containers (e.g., postgres, redis, app) in an 'Up' state.

task_completion.description: Verify the PostgreSQL database was restored using the chinook_db.sql backup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of a command to import the SQL file (e.g., 'docker exec -i <container> psql ... < chinook_db.sql') or logs indicating successful database restoration.

task_completion.description: Verify the Redis data was restored using the redis_restore.txt backup.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of a command to import the Redis text file (e.g., 'cat redis_restore.txt | docker exec -i <container> redis-cli') or logs indicating successful Redis data restoration.

task_completion.description: Verify the restoration by checking the /api/stats endpoint.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a 'curl http://localhost:5000/api/stats' command or a browser window displaying the JSON response with the restored statistics (artists, albums, tracks, sessions).

task_completion.description: Verify an executable backup script was created at ~/projects/acme-musicstore/backup.sh.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the contents of 'backup.sh' (containing database and Redis dump commands targeting backups/latest/) and an 'ls -l' command showing it has executable permissions (+x).

task_completion.description: Verify the backup script was run and successfully created new backups in backups/latest/.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing the execution of './backup.sh' and an 'ls' or 'tree' command showing newly generated backup files inside the 'backups/latest/' directory.

integrity.description: The agent actually interacted with Docker to restore the volumes, rather than just mocking the output.
integrity.visual_evidence: Real Docker command outputs, valid container IDs, and standard Docker logs/formatting instead of manually typed text files.

integrity.description: The agent queried the actual running API endpoint rather than echoing a hardcoded JSON string.
integrity.visual_evidence: Use of 'curl' or a web browser to hit 'http://localhost:5000/api/stats', showing standard HTTP response headers or realistic network formatting.

integrity.description: The backup script was actually executed and generated real files, not just empty mock files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The backup script execution shows realistic output, and the resulting files in 'backups/latest/' have non-zero sizes (e.g., shown via 'ls -lh').

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project directory is /home/ga/projects/acme-musicstore. Backups are in /home/ga/projects/acme-musicstore/backups. API endpoint is http://localhost:5000/api/stats.
